feat.effect: This companion's grabbed or restrained foe takes piercing damage equal to the companion's level plus Strength modifier.
feat.name: Sinking Jaws
feat.prerequisite: *Beastmaster Dedication*; animal companion with a jaws or fangs unarmed attack
feat.requirement: This companion has a creature grabbed or restrained with its jaws or fangs
feat.text:
Like how a constrictor wraps itself around its next meal, your companion tightens its teeth around its constrained prey to squeeze the life out of it. Your companions with a qualifying unarmed attack learn the Sinking Jaws activity.  
  
 **Sinking Jaws**

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
